=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (1:18-1:23) TS6133: 'Layer' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (8:7-8:21) TS6133: '_shouldTrigger' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D3] (9:3-9:10) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn("UserService.getUser")(function*(id) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"UserService.getUser\")"

[D4] (10:5-12:7) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"UserService.getUser\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredOf.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class UserService extends Context.Service<UserService, {
    getUser(id: string): Effect.Effect<void>
  }>()("UserService") {}


const _shouldTrigger = UserService.of({ // UserService is an Effect Tag
  getUser: Effect.fn("UserService.getUser")(function* (id: string) {
    yield* Effect.log(`Looking up user ${id}`);
})
})


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_inferredOf.ts ---
import { Effect, Layer, Context } from "effect"

class UserService extends Context.Service<UserService, {
    getUser(id: string): Effect.Effect<void>
  }>()("UserService") {}


const _shouldTrigger = UserService.of({ // UserService is an Effect Tag
  getUser: (id: string) => Effect.log(`Looking up user ${id}`)
})
